title: Run Feedback
description: Feedback from completed/failed tasks that Orchestrator uses to learn and improve routing. Tracks costs even on failures.

attempt_number.description: Which attempt is this? 1 = first try, 2+ = reassignment

tokens_used.description: Tokens consumed, even if failed. Used for ROI and cost tracking.

virtual_cost.description: What this would have cost via API. Tracked even for free web platforms.

cumulative_tokens.description: Total tokens across all attempts for this task

cumulative_virtual_cost.description: Total virtual cost across all attempts

reassigned_from.description: Previous model/platform if this is a reassignment

reassignment_count.description: How many times has this task been reassigned?

escalation_triggered.description: True if max reassignments reached, triggering escalation

escalation_action.description: What to do after max failures
